questions.question: On the day of Pentecost, what appeared and rested on each of the believers?
Approximately how many people were added to the believers after Peter's sermon at Pentecost?
Some people in the crowd accused the disciples of being drunk when they heard them speaking in other languages.
They continued steadfastly in the apostles' teaching and _____, in the breaking of bread, and prayer.
Peter said to them, '_____ and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of sins.'
